passCriteria: Phase168 CLOSED_CLEANLY is present before Phase169 begins.
A user-provided Phase169 JSON in command_inbox is validated.
The merged unified loop can turn that JSON into REQUEST_READY.
The exact expected ZIP is targeted and can be queued for apply.
The overlay applies and verifier passes.
PASS_GUARANTEED is created before merge approval.
Final handoff or diagnostics can be copied to clipboard.
observedGap: The VBS production runner did not pick up the JSON during the first watch; direct merged unified RunOnce did. Phase169 captures that proof and leaves the runner pickup gap for a follow-up hardening phase.
